prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约21548→18535→14698→25914→25474。2021-2023年呈明显前移趋势（位次数字减小），但2024年广西新高考改革后位次大幅后移至25914，2025年略回升至25474，近两年基准约25474-25914区间；2021-2023年理科计划均为82人，2024年物理类增至92人，2025年增至94人；2026年计划98人，较2025年扩招4人，扩幅约4.3%，招生计划持续增加，一定程度上缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名约第80名（2026年），近年排名稳定在80名左右，学校层次稳固，对考生有持续吸引力；2025年声誉评价偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考；2026年声誉仍偏负面，涉及学术不端事件。抖音热度排名第77位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低，对报考热度影响有限；管理科学与工程获评A级（第五轮学科评估），为该校代表性优势学科；机械工程、电气工程等工科专业依托校本部资源，具备较强实力，对理工类考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校主要招生专业高度契合，可能吸引更多高分考生报考。广西2026年考生总数约39.2万，较2025年（约38万）增加约3.3%，竞争整体加剧。；该校位于安徽宣城，非本省高校，在广西无特殊地域偏好。2025年该校在广西招生占比约2.2%，属中等偏低水平，地域因素对报考影响不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次25474、2026年扩招至98人、广西考生总数增加约3.3%、计算机/电气等热门专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧。预测最低位次约26074名，区间25574-26574名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 21548 → 18535 → 14698 → 25914 → 25474. From 2021 to 2023, there was a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), but after Guangxi's new college entrance examination reform in 2024, the ranking significantly dropped to 25914, and slightly recovered to 25474 in 2025. The recent two-year baseline is approximately in the 25474-25914 range. From 2021 to 2023, the science enrollment plan was 82 students each year; in 2024, the Physics Category increased to 92 students, and in 2025 to 94 students. The 2026 plan is 98 students, an increase of 4 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 4.3%. The enrollment plan continues to increase, alleviating competition pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Ranked approximately 80th in the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with a stable ranking around 80th in recent years. The university's level is solid, maintaining continuous appeal to candidates. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission cutoffs for popular majors and some majors having no applicants. In 2026, the reputation remains somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with an average evaluation; exposure on short video platforms is moderately low, having limited impact on application enthusiasm. Management Science and Engineering was rated A (in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), representing the university's signature advantageous discipline. Engineering majors such as Mechanical Engineering and Electrical Engineering, leveraging the main campus resources, have strong strength and appeal to science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with the university's main enrollment majors, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Guangxi is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (approximately 380,000), intensifying overall competition. The university is located in Xuancheng, Anhui, not a local university in Guangxi, with no special regional preference in Guangxi. In 2025, the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi was about 2.2%, a moderately low level, and regional factors have no significant impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 25474, the 2026 enrollment expansion to 98 students, the increase in Guangxi candidate numbers by about 3.3%, and the sustained high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26074, with a range of 25574-26574.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 25574-26574, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 25574), you can focus on reaching for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control and Intelligent Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 26574), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options to avoid sliding off the admission list.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), with a stable university level.
